title: astragalus beckii
intro: Astragalus beckii, also known as the Beck's milkvetch, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the pea family, Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus beckii has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
